title: leonis trineura
intro: Leonis trineura, also known as the lion's tail, is a flowering plant species belonging to the genus Leonis. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leonis trineura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and relieve respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
